nasb.text: For, on the one hand, there is a setting aside of a former commandment because of its weakness and uselessness

esv.text: For on the one hand, a former commandment is set aside because of its weakness and uselessness

cnv.text: 一方面，從前的條例因為軟弱，沒有用處，就廢棄了；

ccb.text: 以前的条例由于本身的弱点和无益被废除了，

csbs.text: 原来，一方面，先前的条例因着本身的软弱和无用，就被废弃了，
